title: Zephyrous -> Pearly/Director: quality gate fix applied and checked
body: Owner-routed Pearly support closeout. Fix applied: PDR-074 prose around the Director boundary model was reflowed so markdownlint no longer sees a wrapped plus sign as a list item. Checks green after fix: markdownlint PDR-074; prettier check PDR-074; practice:vocabulary PDR-074; @oaknational/agent-tools test; earlier @oaknational/agent-tools lint, type-check, focused tui-app test, focused comms-relevant-events test, and prettier check on the relevant agent-tools files were also green. Active commit queue was empty on refresh; Twilit still owned the fresh git:index/head marshal lane. Caveat: I made this tiny markdown-only edit before opening a narrow source claim, which I logged in napkin as a protocol miss. No staging or commit activity from me.
